global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with engaging text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to unlock rare gear with no ads in the first week.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: IronQuest UGC
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top of the ad, prominently displaying the title 'IronQuest UGC' in a striking font.

elements.label: Unlock rare gear
elements.description: Medium-sized text in the center of the ad, conveying the message 'Unlock rare gear' in a clear and engaging font.

elements.label: No ads in first week
elements.description: Smaller text below the main body text, stating 'No ads in first week' in a simple, readable style.

elements.label: Learn more
elements.description: A button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Learn more', designed to stand out and encourage user interaction.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned at the top right, possibly an icon or graphic that adds visual interest.

elements.label: Center element
elements.description: A small element in the center that is unclear in purpose, possibly a decorative or gameplay-related graphic.

elements.label: Bottom center element
elements.description: Another small element at the bottom center, its purpose is not defined, likely a decorative feature.

elements.label: Top left decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element in the top left corner, adding to the overall design without specific function.

elements.label: Center left decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element in the center left area, contributing to the visual appeal of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom left decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element in the bottom left corner, enhancing the overall design of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom right decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element in the bottom right corner, adding visual interest to the layout.

elements.label: Background
elements.description: A vibrant green background that fills the entire canvas, providing a lively and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Gameplay area
elements.description: A section at the bottom of the ad that may represent gameplay or app features, visually distinct from the text.
elements.text_content: Unlock rare gear No ads in first week

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Learn more', designed to attract user interaction.
